summary: Tested Find & Replace dialog, refactor preview/apply backend endpoints, War Room API (POST/GET), and simulate endpoint. Fixed critical duplicate route conflict that blocked /api/refactor/preview — routes/refactor.py shadowed build_operations.py with a query-param signature. After fix: 11/11 backend tests pass, all dialog UI elements verified working end-to-end.

critical.issue: FIXED by T1: routes/refactor.py (registered at line 5724) had preview_refactor() with query-param signature (project_id: str, refactor_type: str, target: str as query params), which shadowed build_operations.py's dict-body implementation (registered at line 5758). FastAPI first-match routing caused the query-param version to win, returning 422 for all JSON body calls. Fix: removed /preview and /apply routes from routes/refactor.py, letting build_operations.py serve them.

ui_bugs.issue: Cancel button resets refactorPreview to null (correct) but does NOT reset refactorData (target/new_value fields). Re-opening dialog after Cancel shows previous search terms. Minor UX issue.

issues: Dialog renders correctly: type selector, Find Text / Replace With inputs, Preview Changes button (orange border), Apply to N File(s) button, Cancel button. Before/after diff view with red/green panels is clear and well-styled.

action_items: LOW: Reset refactorData (target/new_value) when Cancel is clicked in Find & Replace dialog. Add setRefactorData({ type: 'find_replace', target: '', new_value: '' }) to Cancel onClick in WorkspaceDialogs.jsx line 503.
INFO: War Room currently shows only T1 test messages (TEST_AGENT, FORGE from pytest run). No pipeline agent completion messages exist yet — these will appear after the next full pipeline run.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED CRITICAL: /api/refactor/preview route conflict — routes/refactor.py's preview_refactor(project_id: str, refactor_type: str, target: str, ...) was registered as query-param endpoint, shadowing build_operations.py's dict-body implementation. Fix: removed conflicting /preview and /apply routes from routes/refactor.py.

VERIFY: routes/refactor.py still has POST /ai-suggest with project_id as query param — this also conflicts with build_operations.py's /refactor/ai-suggest (same path pattern). Not critical since frontend doesn't call this, but worth cleaning up.

VERIFIED CLEAN: refactorData and refactorPreview are properly restored as state variables (line 202-203 of ProjectWorkspace.jsx). previewRefactor() calls /api/refactor/preview with JSON body. applyRefactor() calls /api/refactor/apply.

VERIFIED: executeDelegationSilent() posts war room message via POST /api/war-room/message with params: project_id, from_agent, content, message_type='progress' after each parallel agent completes. API working correctly.
CARRY-OVER: POST /api/simulate is now WORKING (was 404 in iter_26, now returns 200 with feasibility metrics).

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all flows working; minor Cancel button state-reset issue)

seed_data_creation: 2 war room messages created during backend tests: TEST_AGENT progress message and FORGE persistence check message.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Find & Replace dialog fully working: type selector, target input (data-testid='refactor-target-input'), new value input, Preview Changes button, Apply to N File(s) (disabled until preview, enabled after). Preview against AbyssalShores returns 3 files affected / 5 scanned with before/after diff. War Room tab works, POST /api/war-room/message and GET /api/war-room/{project_id} both work. POST /api/simulate also works (fixed in iter_26, confirmed in iter_27). Settings dropdown has exactly 7 items. Only remaining minor issue: Cancel button doesn't reset refactorData state.

rca_of_issue.bug: POST /api/refactor/preview returned 422 for all JSON body requests
rca_of_issue.root_cause: Two route handlers registered for same path /api/refactor/preview. routes/refactor.py (registered first, line 5724) defined preview_refactor(project_id: str, refactor_type: str, target: str, ...) — FastAPI treats str params without Body annotation as query parameters. routes/build_operations.py (registered second, line 5758) defined preview_refactor(request: dict) — FastAPI treats dict as JSON body. FastAPI first-match routing caused query-param version to always win, returning 422 validation error when frontend sent JSON body.
rca_of_issue.fix: Removed /preview and /apply route handlers from routes/refactor.py so build_operations.py's dict-body implementations handle these paths.
